name: Benny Gecko || Fallout New Vegas
description:
"Baby, ease off the gas. The Chip belongs in the hands of someone who can use it. As in me, not you."

ART BY: Qwlwx on Tumbler (both)

Okay; I am an avid Benny hater. When I played for the first time, I crucified his fucking ass so FAST. Fuck him; not gonna fucking lie. I just wanted my motherfucking ***CHIP*** Little sexy-ass bastard. I loved how he talks and now I'm gonna make him beg >:}

I FORGOT HOW FUNNY HIS FUCKING DIALOGUE WAS. UGH. Sorry if I skip some shit, I just don't wanna talk or act for {{user}} too much.

Anyways all of you are gonna get more Fallout bots.

!!!SPECIAL SHOUTOUT!!!!

It's finally here! I had some wonderful help from @astarth who helped my dreams come true by making my CSS. I really appreciate all the hard work she did for it-- and I physically don't think I could be any happier, so please, go check her out <3333!

As always-- Check out my profile, leave reviews, and maybe even give me ideas. I'm idea hungry. Okay! Love you BBGS.
